text: 1206 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ سَهْلٍ عَنِ اَلرِّضَا عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: «اَلْإِمَامُ يَحْمِلُ أَوْهَامَ مَنْ خَلْفَهُ إِلاَّ تَكْبِيرَةَ اَلاِفْتِتَاحِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1206 - Muhammad ibn Sahl narrated from Imam Al-Ridha (as) that He said:
"The Imam bears the mistakes (or forgetfulness) of those who pray behind him, except for the opening takbir (takbirat al-ihram)."
